text.value: @concat('INSERT INTO [dbo].[tbl_integration_transaction_log] ([pipeline_name],[pipeline_run_id],[activity_name],[activity_type],[step_name],[execution_status],[severity],[source_system],[target_system],[entity_name],[object_name],[business_key],[correlation_id],[file_name],[doc_id],[message],[error_code],[error_message],[start_time_utc],[end_time_utc],[created_by],[created_at_utc],[document_id],[status],[success_flag],[created_at],[updated_at]) VALUES (''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''Logging Start'',''Script'',''Initialize BIP report download logging'',''InProgress'',''Info'',''Oracle BIP'',''Blob Storage'',''Oracle BIP Report Download'',''', pipeline().parameters.targetDirectory, ''',''', pipeline().parameters.targetDirectory, ''',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''', pipeline().parameters.targetDirectory, ''',NULL,''BIP report download started.'',NULL,NULL,SYSUTCDATETIME(),SYSUTCDATETIME(),''ADF'',SYSUTCDATETIME(),NULL,''in-progress'',NULL,GETDATE(),GETDATE())')

text.value: @concat('INSERT INTO [dbo].[tbl_integration_transaction_log] ([pipeline_name],[pipeline_run_id],[activity_name],[activity_type],[step_name],[execution_status],[severity],[source_system],[target_system],[entity_name],[object_name],[business_key],[correlation_id],[file_name],[doc_id],[message],[error_code],[error_message],[start_time_utc],[end_time_utc],[created_by],[created_at_utc],[document_id],[status],[success_flag],[created_at],[updated_at]) VALUES (''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''Log Download Success'',''Script'',''Complete BIP report download'',''Succeeded'',''Info'',''Oracle BIP'',''Blob Storage'',''Oracle BIP Report Download'',''', concat(pipeline().parameters.targetDirectory, '/', 'Report/'), ''',''', activity('Call BIP ESS Job').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id, ''',''', pipeline().RunId, ''',''', concat('ESS_O_', activity('Call BIP ESS Job').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id, '_BIP.csv'), ''',''', activity('Call BIP ESS Job').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id, ''',''BIP report downloaded and extracted successfully.'',NULL,NULL,SYSUTCDATETIME(),SYSUTCDATETIME(),''ADF'',SYSUTCDATETIME(),''', activity('Call BIP ESS Job').output.pipelineReturnValue.process_id, ''',''completed'',1,GETDATE(),GETDATE())')
